# drift-analyzer

> Deterministic architectural linter and static analysis tool for Python. Detects cross-file coherence problems — pattern fragmentation, architecture violations, dependency cycles, mutant duplicates, and technical debt — in AI-assisted codebases. No LLM in the detection pipeline.

Package: drift-analyzer
Install: pip install drift-analyzer
Repository: https://github.com/sauremilk/drift
Documentation: https://sauremilk.github.io/drift/
Command: drift analyze --repo .

## Use Cases

- Detect pattern fragmentation: same concern implemented N different ways in one module
- Find architecture violations: imports crossing layer boundaries, circular dependencies
- Identify mutant duplicates: near-identical functions from copy-paste AI scaffolding
- Measure explainability deficit: complex functions without documentation or types
- Track temporal volatility: files changed by too many authors too fast
- Detect system misalignment: novel import patterns foreign to their module
- CI gate: block PRs on high-severity architectural findings via GitHub Actions
- Trend tracking: monitor drift score evolution over time

## Signals

- PFS: Pattern Fragmentation (weight 0.22)
- AVS: Architecture Violations (weight 0.22)
- MDS: Mutant Duplicates (weight 0.17)
- TVS: Temporal Volatility (weight 0.17)
- EDS: Explainability Deficit (weight 0.12)
- SMS: System Misalignment (weight 0.10)
- DIA: Doc-Implementation Drift (report-only, weight 0.00)

## Optional

- [Full Benchmark Study](https://github.com/sauremilk/drift/blob/master/STUDY.md): 97.3% precision on 263 ground-truth-labeled findings across 15 repositories
- [Changelog](https://github.com/sauremilk/drift/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md): version history and signal improvements
- [Case Studies](https://sauremilk.github.io/drift/case-studies/): FastAPI, Pydantic, Django
- [GitHub Action](https://github.com/sauremilk/drift/blob/master/action.yml): CI integration with SARIF upload

## Keywords

architectural linter, architecture drift, architectural erosion, architecture degradation, technical debt detection, dependency cycle detection, import analysis, pattern fragmentation, static analysis, Python, monorepo, GitHub Copilot, AI coding tools, code quality, architecture enforcement
